title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
